TH_YOUMU-SWORD_GAS_POWER.title: Sword Gas
TH_YOUMU-SWORD_GAS_POWER.description:
When dealing damage with an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, make the enemy lose an additional [blue]1[/blue] HP. Removed at the end of your turn.
[gold]Right-click[/gold] a [green]Youmu card[/green] to [gold]consume[/gold] all [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] and increase that card's damage by that much for this combat.
TH_YOUMU-SWORD_GAS_POWER.smartDescriptio:
When dealing damage with an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, make the enemy lose an additional [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP. Removed at the end of your turn.
[gold]Right-click[/gold] a [green]Youmu card[/green] to [gold]consume[/gold] all [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] and increase that card's damage by that much for this combat.
TH_YOUMU-STIFFNESS_POWER.title: Stiffness
TH_YOUMU-STIFFNESS_POWER.description: The next [blue]1[/blue] card this turn cannot be an [gold]Attack[/gold] card. Playing other cards reduces the stack by [blue]1[/blue].
TH_YOUMU-STIFFNESS_POWER.smartDescriptio:
The next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s) this turn cannot be [gold]Attack[/gold] cards. Playing other cards reduces the stack by [blue]1[/blue].
Current [gold]Stiffness[/gold] level: {Type}.
TH_YOUMU-COMBO_POWER.title: Combo
TH_YOUMU-COMBO_POWER.description:
When you play a card, reduce the cost of the next card of the same type by [blue]1[/blue] this turn, but reduce its damage by [blue]10%[/blue].
Playing a card of the same type increases the stack by [blue]1[/blue]; playing a different type resets the stack and grants that many stacks of [gold]Normal Stiffness[/gold] (only if above [blue]1[/blue]).
TH_YOUMU-COMBO_POWER.smartDescription:
When you play a card, reduce the cost of the next card of the same type by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] this turn, but reduce its damage by [blue]{Amount}0%[/blue].
Playing a card of the same type increases the stack by [blue]1[/blue]; playing a different type resets the stack and grants [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Normal Stiffness[/gold] (only if at least [blue]2[/blue]).
Previous card type played: {Type}.
TH_YOUMU-WHITE_SWORD_POWER.title: White Blade
TH_YOUMU-WHITE_SWORD_POWER.description: Increase damage dealt by [blue]25%[/blue] for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more turn(s).
TH_YOUMU-WHITE_SWORD_POWER.smartDescript: Increase damage dealt by [blue]25%[/blue] for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more turn(s).
TH_YOUMU-YELLOW_SWORD_POWER.title: Yellow Blade
TH_YOUMU-YELLOW_SWORD_POWER.description: Increase damage dealt by [blue]50%[/blue] for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more turn(s).
TH_YOUMU-YELLOW_SWORD_POWER.smartDescrip: Increase damage dealt by [blue]50%[/blue] for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more turn(s).
TH_YOUMU-RED_SWORD_POWER.title: Red Blade
TH_YOUMU-RED_SWORD_POWER.description: Increase damage dealt by [blue]100%[/blue] for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more turn(s).
TH_YOUMU-RED_SWORD_POWER.smartDescriptio: Increase damage dealt by [blue]100%[/blue] for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more turn(s).
TH_YOUMU-DEFEND_IN_ATTACK_POWER.title: Defense within Offense
TH_YOUMU-DEFEND_IN_ATTACK_POWER.descript: Whenever you deal damage with an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-DEFEND_IN_ATTACK_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you deal damage with an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-ATTACK_WITH_DEFEND_POWER.title: Attack and Defend as One
TH_YOUMU-ATTACK_WITH_DEFEND_POWER.descri: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-ATTACK_WITH_DEFEND_POWER.smartD: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-SMALL_SOUL_POWER.title: Phantom Serial (Small)
TH_YOUMU-SMALL_SOUL_POWER.description: All [gold]Attack[/gold] cards you play this turn are played an additional [blue]1[/blue] time.
TH_YOUMU-SMALL_SOUL_POWER.smartDescripti: All [gold]Attack[/gold] cards you play this turn are played an additional [blue]1[/blue] time.
TH_YOUMU-BIG_SOUL_POWER.title: Phantom Serial
TH_YOUMU-BIG_SOUL_POWER.description: For [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns, all cards you play are played an additional [blue]1[/blue] time.
TH_YOUMU-BIG_SOUL_POWER.smartDescription: For [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns, all cards you play are played an additional [blue]1[/blue] time.
TH_YOUMU-SIX_ELEMENT_CLEAN_POWER.title: Six Roots Purification Slash
TH_YOUMU-SIX_ELEMENT_CLEAN_POWER.descrip: You cannot lose HP until the start of your next turn.
TH_YOUMU-SIX_ELEMENT_CLEAN_POWER.smartDe: You cannot lose HP until the start of your next turn.
TH_YOUMU-RETAIN_SWORD_GAS_POWER.title: Subdue Without Pause
TH_YOUMU-RETAIN_SWORD_GAS_POWER.descript: Your [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] is not removed at the end of your turn until [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s) from now.
TH_YOUMU-RETAIN_SWORD_GAS_POWER.smartDes: Your [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] is not removed at the end of your turn until [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn(s) from now.
TH_YOUMU-A_THOUGHT_COUNTLESS_KALPAS_POWE: Playing cards this turn no longer costs energy; instead, gain that much [gold]Decay[/gold].
Playing cards this turn no longer costs energy; instead, gain that much [gold]Decay[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-SMART_HALF_POWER.title: Clever Half-Phantom
TH_YOUMU-SMART_HALF_POWER.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage this turn, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-SMART_HALF_POWER.smartDescripti: For [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns, whenever you deal unblocked damage, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-SWORD_HEART_POWER.title: Sword Heart Unhindered
TH_YOUMU-SWORD_HEART_POWER.description: At the start of your turn: if any enemy intends to block, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] for each such enemy; if any enemy intends to attack, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] for each such enemy; if any enemy intends to do something else, gain [blue]1[/blue] energy and draw [blue]1[/blue] card for each such enemy.
TH_YOUMU-SWORD_HEART_POWER.smartDescript:
At the start of your turn:
If any enemy intends to block, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] for each such enemy.
If any enemy intends to attack, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] for each such enemy.
If any enemy intends to do something else, gain {Amount:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s) for each such enemy.
TH_YOUMU-WIND_WOOD_FIRE_MOUNTAIN_POWER.d:
At the start of your turn, cycle through and gain the following effects:
Draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
Gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-WIND_WOOD_FIRE_MOUNTAIN_POWER.s:
At the start of your turn, cycle through and gain the following effects:
Draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
Gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.

TH_YOUMU-DUAL_HEAVEN_STYLE_POWER.title: Niten Ichi-ryu
TH_YOUMU-DUAL_HEAVEN_STYLE_POWER.descrip:
Your [gold]Attack[/gold] cards are played an additional time, but deal [blue]25%[/blue] less damage.
If you have [gold]The Book of Five Rings[/gold], damage is not reduced.
TH_YOUMU-DUAL_HEAVEN_STYLE_POWER.smartDe:
Your [gold]Attack[/gold] cards are played an additional time, but deal [blue]25%[/blue] less damage.
If you have [gold]The Book of Five Rings[/gold], damage is not reduced.
TH_YOUMU-LIFE_DEATH_HALF_HALF_POWER.titl: Half & Half of Life and Death
TH_YOUMU-LIFE_DEATH_HALF_HALF_POWER.desc:
When your HP is above [blue]50%[/blue], double damage dealt, but lose [blue]6[/blue] HP each time you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card.
When your HP is below [blue]50%[/blue], halve damage taken, and heal [blue]6[/blue] HP each time you play a [gold]Skill[/gold] card.
TH_YOUMU-LIFE_DEATH_HALF_HALF_POWER.smar:
When your HP is above [blue]50%[/blue], double damage dealt, but lose [blue]6[/blue] HP each time you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card.
When your HP is below [blue]50%[/blue], halve damage taken, and heal [blue]6[/blue] HP each time you play a [gold]Skill[/gold] card.
TH_YOUMU-DEATH_HALF_POWER.title: Death-Wish Half-Phantom
TH_YOUMU-DEATH_HALF_POWER.description: Whenever an enemy takes damage originating from you, gain that much [gold]Demise[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-DEATH_HALF_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever an enemy takes damage originating from you, gain that much [gold]Demise[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-STILL_WATER_POWER.title: Still Water Mirror
TH_YOUMU-STILL_WATER_POWER.description: For each [gold]Combo[/gold] stack, increase damage dealt by [blue]{Amount}0%[/blue].
TH_YOUMU-STILL_WATER_POWER.smartDescript: For each [gold]Combo[/gold] stack, increase damage dealt by [blue]{Amount}0%[/blue].
TH_YOUMU-HEART_EYE_POWER.title: Meditation Slash「Roukanken Gives Me the Heart's Eye」
TH_YOUMU-HEART_EYE_POWER.description: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, [gold]Attack Derive[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
TH_YOUMU-HEART_EYE_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, [gold]Attack Derive[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SWORD_SHARP_POWER.title: Half-Sword Sharp
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SWORD_SHARP_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SWORD_SHARP_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SWORD_HEART_POWER.title: Half-Sword Heart
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SWORD_HEART_POWER.descript: Your [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] is not removed at the end of your turn.
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SWORD_HEART_POWER.smartDes: Your [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] is not removed at the end of your turn.
TH_YOUMU-YOUMU_POWER.title: Half-Human Half-Phantom Gardener
TH_YOUMU-YOUMU_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Derive[/gold], gain energy equal to the cost of the [gold]Derived[/gold] card.
TH_YOUMU-YOUMU_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you [gold]Derive[/gold], gain energy equal to the cost of the [gold]Derived[/gold] card.
TH_YOUMU-CARD_SLASHER_POWER.title: Card Slasher
TH_YOUMU-CARD_SLASHER_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount:energyIcons()} extra, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
TH_YOUMU-CARD_SLASHER_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount:energyIcons()} extra, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
TH_YOUMU-BIZARRE_SIX_REALMS_POWER.title: Bizarre Six Realms
TH_YOUMU-BIZARRE_SIX_REALMS_POWER.descri:
Whenever you play a card of a different type than the previous card, trigger an effect based on the previous card's type.
[gold]Attack[/gold]: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
[gold]Skill[/gold]: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
[gold]Power[/gold]: Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
TH_YOUMU-BIZARRE_SIX_REALMS_POWER.smartD:
Whenever you play a card of a different type than the previous card, trigger an effect based on the previous card's type.

[gold]Power[/gold]: Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
TH_YOUMU-SEIZE_RETURN_POWER.title: Seize and Return
TH_YOUMU-SEIZE_RETURN_POWER.description: After triggering [gold]Counter[/gold], return that card to your hand.
TH_YOUMU-SEIZE_RETURN_POWER.smartDescrip: After triggering [gold]Counter[/gold], return that card to your hand.
TH_YOUMU-KIRISUTE_GOMEN_POWER.title: Kirisute Gomen
TH_YOUMU-KIRISUTE_GOMEN_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you lose HP, multiply the damage you deal in this combat by [blue]1[/blue].
TH_YOUMU-KIRISUTE_GOMEN_POWER.smartDescr:
Whenever you lose HP, multiply the damage you deal in this combat by [blue]1[/blue].
Current damage multiplier: [red]{Amount}[/red]
TH_YOUMU-HALF_HALF_HALF_POWER.title: Half-Human Half-Phantom Half-Wit
TH_YOUMU-HALF_HALF_HALF_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you [gold]Derive[/gold], automatically play the [gold]Derived[/gold] card [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s), then shuffle that many [gold]Clumsy[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-HALF_HALF_HALF_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you [gold]Derive[/gold], automatically play the [gold]Derived[/gold] card [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s), then shuffle that many [gold]Clumsy[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_GARDEN_POWER.title: Phantom Gardener
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_GARDEN_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card with [gold]Ethereal[/gold], [gold]Derive[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] of its type, and give the [gold]Derived[/gold] cards [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_GARDEN_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you play a card with [gold]Ethereal[/gold], [gold]Derive[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] of its type, and give the [gold]Derived[/gold] cards [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_SWORD_GOD_POWER.title: Mysterious Sword Saint
TH_YOUMU-HALF_ETHERAL_GARDEN_POWER.title: Half-Phantom Gardener
TH_YOUMU-HALF_ETHERAL_GARDEN_POWER.descr:
Cards with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] can be played for free.
When you play a card, if it does not have [gold]Ethereal[/gold], give it [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-HALF_ETHERAL_GARDEN_POWER.smart:
Cards with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] can be played for free.
When you play a card, if it does not have [gold]Ethereal[/gold], give it [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-SKY_FORM_POWER.title: Heavenly Form
TH_YOUMU-SKY_FORM_POWER.description:
Your [gold]Cancel[/gold] now ignores [gold]Cancel Level[/gold] and always succeeds, but if the [gold]Canceled[/gold] card's [gold]Cancel Level[/gold] is not lower than the one canceling it, put it on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Whenever you [gold]Cancel[/gold], gain energy equal to the cost of the [gold]Canceled[/gold] card and reset [gold]Combo[/gold] stacks.
TH_YOUMU-SKY_FORM_POWER.smartDescription:
Your [gold]Cancel[/gold] now ignores [gold]Cancel Level[/gold] and always succeeds, but if the [gold]Canceled[/gold] card's [gold]Cancel Level[/gold] is not lower than the one canceling it, put it on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Whenever you [gold]Cancel[/gold], gain {Amount:energyIcons()} equal to the cost of the [gold]Canceled[/gold] card and reset [gold]Combo[/gold] stacks.
TH_YOUMU-SHOT_BIRD_EVENT_POWER.title: Hiroari Shoots a Strange Bird
TH_YOUMU-SHOT_BIRD_EVENT_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, put [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random [gold]Attack[/gold] cards into all players' hands; they cost 0 the first time played this turn.
TH_YOUMU-SHOT_BIRD_EVENT_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of your turn, put [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random [gold]Attack[/gold] cards into all players' hands; they cost 0 the first time played this turn.
